svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Hardware Bench" id="bench-1"> <mxGraphModel dx="1222" dy="794" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="600" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="server" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fillColor=none;" value="Host Server" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="160" x="80" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcu" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1" value="Target MCU
(STM32)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="80" x="520" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="proctor" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fillColor=none;" value="Proctor" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="520" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;fontSize=11;entryX=0;entryY=0.25;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;verticalAlign=bottom;" target="mcu" value="flash trajectory code"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="240" y="140" as="sourcePoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="mcu" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=top;exitX=0;exitY=0.75;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" value="retrieve STDIO"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="420" y="230" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="240" y="180" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;fontSize=11;verticalAlign=bottom;entryX=0;entryY=0.25;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="proctor" value="configure proctor"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="240" y="300" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="480" y="300" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="proctor" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0;exitY=0.75;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;verticalAlign=top;" value="retrieve result signals and STDIO"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="370" y="390" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="240" y="340" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="proctor" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="jUwmWIB3q33U7_koHuax-5" value="general purpose connections"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="jUwmWIB3q33U7_koHuax-1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="320" width="240" x="480" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="jUwmWIB3q33U7_koHuax-3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="Hardware Environment" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="160" x="520" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="jUwmWIB3q33U7_koHuax-5" parent="1" style="shape=image;html=1;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;imageAspect=1;aspect=fixed;image=data:image/webp,;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="80" x="600" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
